title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA System Reconnaissance JSON
description: Detects BLUELIGHT system profiling via ipinfo.io lookups and structured JSON recon data collection (UserName, ComName, OS, OnlineIP, AntiVirus, VM detection). Source: Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight $msg strings.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events') and ('Original Log Content' like '%ipinfo.io%' or ('Original Log Content' like '%UserName%' and 'Original Log Content' like '%ComName%' and 'Original Log Content' like '%AntiVirus%' and 'Original Log Content' like '%OnlineIP%')) | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: Legitimate ipinfo.io lookups from DevOps tools
